description: PROP-EPNS-003 property tests (prop-003-classify-editing.harness.test.ts) use the default isEmpty implementation embedded in classifyCurrentSession. Since Sprint 1 FIND-002 changed the architecture so isEmpty is injected as a parameter from the pipeline, the property tests do not cover the injected-isEmpty path that is actually exercised in production (pipeline.ts:98 passes ports.isEmpty). The tests prove the default implementation works but not that the injection mechanism preserves the isEmpty-to-classification biconditional under arbitrary isEmpty predicates.

evidence.snippet: const result = classifyCurrentSession(state, note); // uses default isEmpty, not injected
